testcase.name: Should convert JsonPrimitive long to Document.Number
Should convert all numeric types in Document.Number correctly
Should convert JsonPrimitive float to Document.Number
Should convert Document.Number with Double to JsonPrimitive
Should convert JsonPrimitive int to Document.Number
Should convert Document.List with null elements to JsonArray with JsonNull
Should convert JsonPrimitive boolean to Document.Boolean
Should convert Document.Number with Float to JsonPrimitive
Should convert JsonArray to Document.List recursively
Should convert Document.Number with Long to JsonPrimitive
Should convert Document.Number with Int to JsonPrimitive
Should handle complex nested structures with arrays and objects
Should handle JsonPrimitive fallback to string
Should convert JsonPrimitive double to Document.Number
